The only real FAIL is slide 6's CTA clipping. The `.tn-cta span` has `-webkit-line-clamp:1` which shears the descender on "Save this now". I'll fix the clamp/padding on the CTA and also fix the invalid `--accent` duplicate/garbled token line. The photo warnings are placeholder artifacts (grey svg), not fixable in template — but I'll leave photo slots as-is. Minimal edits: fix the corrupted `:root` `--accent` line, and give the CTA span enough vertical room.
